system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: orders@finolab-electronics.de
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job
DETECTED INTENT: wo_update_request
ACTION: update_work_order
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_one_click', 'action': 'update_work_order', 'preview': {'action': 'update_work_order', 'customer_id': 10, 'extracted': {'work_order_number': None, 'order_number': None, 'requested_action': 'Add 2 additional assets to the open calibration work order and coordinate a single on-site technician visit', 'add_assets': [{'asset_name': 'N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer', 'serial_number': 'KS-MXA-441298', 'notes': 'Normal calibration interval'}, {'asset_name': 'DSOX3024T Oscilloscope', 'serial_number': 'KS-DSOX-882011', 'notes': 'Normal calibration interval'}], 'add_note': 'Customer requests both additional assets be covered under active service contract and scheduled so all assets are calibrated in one technician visit.', 'add_task': 'Coordinate schedule to calibrate all assets in one on-site technician visit', '_intent': 'wo_update_request'}}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'work_order_number': None, 'order_number': None, 'requested_action': 'Add 2 additional assets to the open calibration work order and coordinate a single on-site technician visit', 'add_assets': [{'asset_name': 'N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer', 'serial_number': 'KS-MXA-441298', 'notes': 'Normal calibration interval'}, {'asset_name': 'DSOX3024T Oscilloscope', 'serial_number': 'KS-DSOX-882011', 'notes': 'Normal calibration interval'}], 'add_note': 'Customer requests both additional assets be covered under active service contract and scheduled so all assets are calibrated in one technician visit.', 'add_task': 'Coordinate schedule to calibrate all assets in one on-site technician visit', '_intent': 'wo_update_request'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job", "body": "Dear Finolab Electronics Team,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your open calibration work order.

We have received your request to add the following two assets to the existing job:

  1. N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer (S/N: KS-MXA-441298) — normal calibration interval
  2. DSOX3024T Oscilloscope (S/N: KS-DSOX-882011) — normal calibration interval

We have also noted your request that both additional assets be covered under your active service contract and that all assets be scheduled together so the calibration can be completed during a single on-site technician visit.

This update is currently pending internal confirmation. Once approved, we will update the work order accordingly and our scheduling team will coordinate a consolidated visit date with you. You can expect a follow-up from us shortly with the confirmed details.

If you have any further information to share in the meantime, please feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team"}

parsed.subject: Re: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job
parsed.body:
Dear Finolab Electronics Team,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your open calibration work order.

We have received your request to add the following two assets to the existing job:

  1. N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer (S/N: KS-MXA-441298) — normal calibration interval
  2. DSOX3024T Oscilloscope (S/N: KS-DSOX-882011) — normal calibration interval

We have also noted your request that both additional assets be covered under your active service contract and that all assets be scheduled together so the calibration can be completed during a single on-site technician visit.

This update is currently pending internal confirmation. Once approved, we will update the work order accordingly and our scheduling team will coordinate a consolidated visit date with you. You can expect a follow-up from us shortly with the confirmed details.

If you have any further information to share in the meantime, please feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team
